latin: Caesar ad ripam Rubiconis fluminis stetit. lex Romana imperatorem cum exercitu flumen transire vetabat. Caesar aleam iecit et dixit: 'alea iacta est.' transgressus est et bellum civile coepit.

questions.target: A general could not cross the river with an army
choices: He could not enter Rome at night
A general could not cross the river with an army

translation: Caesar stood at the bank of the river Rubicon. Roman law forbade a general from crossing the river with an army. Caesar threw the die and said: 'The die is cast.' He crossed and the civil war began.
